assertionResults.fullName: useWorkspaceKeyboard shortcuts opens the command palette on Ctrl+K and Cmd+K
assertionResults.title: opens the command palette on Ctrl+K and Cmd+K

assertionResults.fullName: useWorkspaceKeyboard shortcuts undoes on Ctrl/Cmd+Z and redoes on Shift+Ctrl/Cmd+Z
assertionResults.title: undoes on Ctrl/Cmd+Z and redoes on Shift+Ctrl/Cmd+Z

assertionResults.fullName: useWorkspaceKeyboard shortcuts ignores shortcuts when typing in an editable field
assertionResults.title: ignores shortcuts when typing in an editable field

assertionResults.fullName: useWorkspaceKeyboard shortcuts does not bind when disabled
assertionResults.title: does not bind when disabled
